mapper.select: SELECT id, questionId, seq, choiceText, imageUrl, isCorrect FROM qbank_question_choice WHERE questionId = #{questionId} ORDER BY seq
SELECT id FROM qbank_question_choice WHERE questionId = #{questionId} AND isCorrect = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qbank_question_choice WHERE questionId = #{questionId} AND isCorrect = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qbank_question_choice (questionId, seq, choiceText, imageUrl, isCorrect) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{seq}, #{choiceText}, #{imageUrl}, #{isCorrect})
